The '''''Harpago''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] in the use of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] during his betrayal and attempted capture of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] realized that Palpatine was in danger after questioning [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] following the aftermath of thwarting Zaarin's attempts to destroy the [[Garrett (Star Destroyer)|''Garrett'']], which left it in a damaged state so it couldn't make it back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in time. Darth Vader decided to pilot a [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] along with veteran pilot [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] as the wing leader. The Harpago, along with multiple [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]], which were used as escort, attempted to stall the rescue forces led by Darth Vader from reaching the Emperor. However, they managed to destroy the escort fighters and then the ship itself. ''Harpago''{{'s}} destruction allowed Darth Vader to reach the Emperor in time before he was delivered to Zaarin.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
